entry.title: Re: Data Migration object in S/4 HANA Cloud-Supplier extended
entry.content: Hi, we will remove the "SAP Community" tag as it is not relevant to the posted topic.

entry.title: Re: Is it Possible to Deserialize this JSON from API in ABAP
entry.content:
You are correct, when I remove the commas after the '4' rows, Notepad++ generates a Schema.  This was just from me "cleaning up" the JSON data, not how the API is returning the data.  But I'm not sure how to turn that schema into an ABAP structure for /ui2/cl_json to deserialize into.  Here is the schema that is generated by Notepad++:

{
"$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
"properties": {
        "outputs": {
                "type": "object"
        },
        "tables": {
              "items": {
                    "properties": {
                          "columns": {
                                "items": {
                                      "type": "string"
                                },
                                "type": "array"
                          },
                          "rowLimitExceeded": {
                                "type": "boolean"
                          },
                          "rows": {
                                "items": {
                                      "items": {
                                            "type": "string"
                                      },
                                      "type": "array"
                                },
                                "type": "array"
                          }
                    },
                    "required": [
                          "columns",
                          "rowLimitExceeded",
                          "rows"
                    ],
                    "type": "object"
              },
              "type": "array"
        },
        "transactionNo": {
              "type": "string"
        }
},
"required": [
        "outputs",
        "tables",
        "transactionNo"
],
"type": "object"
}

Any idea on how to generate or match an ABAP deep structure to this schema?

Looking forward for this solution Or Any Clues to get fix 

 

Thanks,  

Tarun.

entry.title: Re: Material doc in AFRU table
entry.content:
HI Peter,

thanks for your inspiration, I tried to find the new MBLNR after confirmation.

I just searched in AFWI with RUECK and RMZHL from timeticket and also MJAHR is not initial, then I got what I want.

BR

i am going to add 2 custom fields in  Asset History sheet (F1615) Fiori app .

Could some one help me with procedures or step by step steps.

entry.title: Re: Error when trying to create a scheduled publication in SAC
entry.content: On trying to find the cause of the issue, it is not permissions related, data load also had to be ruled out as the error comes even when run from small volume of data; even checked the connection configuration and did not find anything wrong. please suggest.

entry.title: CAP Handler for all entities at once
entry.content:
Hi All!

I'm doing an Experiment for an 'audit log table' for CAP. My objective is log all create/update/delete transactions, something like this:

this.before(['CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE'], 'Users', async (req) => {
const { ID, firstName, lastName, Country, favouriteFood } = req.data;

// Capture change details
const changeDetails = {
firstName, lastName, Country, favouriteFood
};

const db = await cds.connect.to('db')

// Create an audit log entry
await cds.run(INSERT.into("pocaudit.AuditLogs").entries({
ID: cds.utils.uuid(),
entityName: 'Users',
entityID: ID,
action: req.event.toUpperCase(),
timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
changedBy: req.user.id,
changes: JSON.stringify(changeDetails)
}));
});

But this event requires I mention the entity. Do you know any way to capture ALL entities so I can make only one handler?

Thanks!!

P.S.: I'm aware of Audit Log Service, but my context requires the audit to stay on a table.

entry.title: Annotation File Managere is not supported
entry.content:
I created an CAP service, based on the risk management example. Than I tried to extend a fiori elements list report or overview page with guided developement. Evertime I'm trying to insert a snippet it tells me that there is no local annotation file. 

Than Im trying to open the Annotation File Manager, but I always get the message: Annotation File Manager is not supported for the current project. Could you guys help me with this?

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: How to extract contents from a Rich Text Editor?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to extract the contents from a Rich text Editor using SAP IRPA? For eg., in below case I want to extract the text, "USA only jobs (job country field=USA). This is a view only field for all other countries." from the screen and store it in a String variable in the automation that can be used further. I've declared the editor as an IFRAME element from screen but am not able to drill further and get the contents. Get Element, Get Property Element are also not giving the results.

entry.title: SAP learning system through EMI payment subscription
entry.content:
How do I subscribe SAP learning whole package through equal monthly installment payment (EMI) option for a year, inclusive of exams fees?

Is there any financial help available for dependents on parents?

If possible, then directly mention web link of subscription page.

Kindly Reply

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS upgrade from V11 to E4H
entry.content:
Best starting point will be the Conversion guide.

https://help.sap.com/gtse4h

You will find the changes to config tables and all the data migration that is been done and changes to the tables.

entry.title: Re: SCMS_BINARY_TO_XSTRING is not permitted in Cloud
entry.content:
Hi!

This question was posted some years ago and I just stumbled across it, but I will provide an answer that might still help others. You can use the XCO_CP (Cloud) or XCO_KU (Key-User) APIs, depending on your use case. There you have an option to e.g. convert XStrings. Please see these documentations:

For Key-Users: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/de1346c0520c40ff98974ee6f431e39f.html

For Cloud: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/0c7aa6642b294709abcc0e3de0488f1a.html

I hope this helps!
~Mathis

entry.title: Re: S/4 Product Compliance - NEW Dangerous Goods Manageme...
entry.content: Mind you, i haven't yet started with DGM.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation - Setup when test and productive systems are available later
entry.content:
Does SAP Cloud ALM (Features) supports scenario where development system is available, but test and productive systems are available later (meaning, test system might be available 3 months later than development system and productive system more than 9 months after development system provisioning).

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation - Setup when test an...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

For the requirement : "but test and productive systems are available later (meaning, test system might be available 3 months later than development system and productive system more than 9 months after development system provisioning)." - At TMS, you will need to first create Target system as virtual system as it is not available for certain duration than when the development system is available 

Create the target system virtual system with the SID of the later real target system and follow the recommendation given in https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/tms-configuration-managed-systems 

You could create transport target group between Development and Quality systems and then create another one between Quality and Production systems. (We strongly recommend using a transport target group as a consolidation target). 

As always, TMS transport track is the real and main information used by the Deployment scenario but the system group content should fit with the real transport track defined at TMS level. 

Create the virtual systems with same SID and the routes with the transport target group.

Best Regards, 
Deepa

entry.title: Re: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore
entry.content:
@Vidyadhar_Kothekar @nawal_mittal 

Just to be super clear - Vidyadhar is NOT an SAP employee and is NOT authorized or approved to conduct SAP CodeJams.  I have no idea why this person is answering here or offering to conduct a CodeJam.  They absolutely cannot do this without SAP's permission and support. 

That said, someone from our SAP Developer Advocates team will be in touch to discuss the CodeJam request.

We have activated parallel currencies depreciation area for revaluation in asset accounting. The parallel currencies have values, but after fill the revaluation key, the values are being deleted automatically in these depreciation area. What can we do it?

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Creating Dependent RAP BO Entities via Root Entity Determination Logic
entry.content:
Hello, Experts!,

Could you please provide guidance on whether it is considered a best practice to create a dependent entity within a RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) Business Object by using the determination logic of the root entity?

Specifically, what are the best practices and considerations for implementing such an approach, and under what circumstances might this be recommended or discouraged? Kindly advice.

entry.title: Re: Create an offline mobile app using successfactors oda...
entry.content:
@vhsbc92 

Just to confirm, did you try calling the "Launch in browser" option for the SuccessFactors destination configured under Mobile Connectivity in the admin UI? And were you able to see the data? 

Did you already try accessing the data in Online mode in your MDK app? Change OfflineEnabled parameter to false in .service file in your MDK metadata project.

Did you use MDK template in BAS to generate a project? What template type did you choose?

Hema

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 (#sitMUC) - Secure Your Spot Now!
entry.content: Hello, thanks to a great SAP Support Employee the issue with the SITreg application is fixed. Let me know if you still face any issues.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG DQM Derivations for custom fields
entry.content:
Hi, DQM derivations for custom fields are supported. Custom fields means extension to a SAP delivered entity. These fields can be used as condition of result field within a derivation rule. If you extend with a new table, this new table cannot be used as result table in a derivation rule.

For extending DQM see the following blog. 

If you do not see the custom fields in BRFplus, you might need to update the BRFplus infrastructure, see help

Regards, Sabine

entry.title: Re: crystal report viewer not showing images
entry.content:
Hi Donwilliams

We went through KBA https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3204578 but still, the images are not loading.
we ran fix_ole.bat file after extracting the zip

entry.title: Calculated Inspection Characteristics using BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using the FM BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS to save inspection characteristics (on SINGLE_RESULTS level) and it's working just fine.
The problem ist that we have a calculated characteristic depending on the other entered characteristics.
The calculation is working fine when I enter the values using QE51N transaction (values calculated, and characteristic closed), but it's not working using the FM BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS. The calculated characteristic is not calculated and not closed.
I've tried the solution described in the SAP Note 3088890 by calling the BAPI twice with a commit between the two calls but it's still not working.
Do you have any idea how to trigger the re-calculation ?

Thank you

entry.title: PIR for different storage locations
entry.content:
Hi,

I have one plant, one material and two different storage locations.

I need to create two Planned independent requirements for both storage locations. So I created:

1. Production version 1 for Storage location A

2. Production version 2 for Storage location B

Then:

1. MD61 - created PIR for both Production versions for the same week

2. MD03 - ran MRP

3. Planned order is created

The problem is that Planned order was created only one for both PIR with general amount. But I need two Planned orders who each PIR.

I found some discussions but there is no solution yet.

My solution is to create separate MRP areas for both storage locations and use them during creation of PIR. It works.

Maybe there is some other better solution?

Kind regards,

entry.title: SCIM SuccessFactors API - Update the "name"
entry.content:
Hi folks!,

I'm suffering some errors with the IPS - SAC replication due to the field "name" of an user is empty.

I checked the user in SuccessFactors and it "seems" ok, but if I perform a API call with Postman I can see that is empty. I don't know how to fix that manually so my idea was to fill it via API call (with PATCH)

Below the GET where you can see that the "name" is empty.

And here the PATCH to fill the "name". It doesn't generate error, but is not changing anything. So without an error I can not understand what is failing (tested with op "replace" and "add"

Any clue regarding why the PATCH is not doing the change (and is not generating error) ?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Deploy Application using Docker Container on SAP Cloud Foundry : 2020
entry.content:
4 years later, and still the steps are working and it was a great starting point for a deep-dive session how to push a docker image to CF.

I highly recommend to use at least a manifest.yml or mta.yaml to store the docker details. Especially, if you're not using dockerHub. Here are more details about how to do so.

 

Thanks for the great blog!

Best regards, Cedric

entry.title: Re: DISPATCHER IS NOT STARTING AFTER DATABASE RESTORE

entry.title: Re: Cost Budget and Availability Control on SAP ECC, and S/4HANA On premise.
entry.content:
Hi Gianluca,

Thanks for the amazing and informative blog. 

We are facing an issue in our S/4HANA 2020 system where the Budget availability control is not checked for Non-Material assigned PRs or POs and also no commitments are created.

However, non Material relevant POs, everything is fine, which would mean the configuration etc. is all working. Do you know what could the reason for the Non-Material Purchase Orders (or PRs).

Thanks,

Ankit

entry.title: Settlement of cost accrual/deferral with zero values
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is there any settings for settling the values of cost accrual (WIPR and RUCR) with zero values?

As a standard feature in SAP the zero values from Result Analysis any categories cannot be settled as they are skipped in the final settlement run but we need this to appear in the final settlement as we have an existing enhancement to overwrite the final settlement values.

Please let me know with your expertise if this is possible by any means?

 

Regards,

Suman Misra

A.

entry.title: How Automated Processing Rules for Bank Statement works?
entry.content:
In today’s fast-paced business environment, efficiency and accuracy in financial management are paramount. As organizations strive to streamline their operations and reduce manual effort, automation has become a key focus. One area where automation can significantly impact is the processing of bank statements. This is where SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition steps in with its powerful automated processing rules.

It offers a range of functionalities that enhance financial operations, including comprehensive tools for managing and processing bank statements. Automated processing rules in SAP S/4HANA Cloud are designed to simplify and expedite the reconciliation process, ensuring that financial data is accurate and up to date.

Automated processing rules take the complexity out of bank statement management by applying predefined rules to incoming bank statement data. This means that instead of manually reviewing and posting each transaction, the system can automatically allocate transactions to the correct accounts, match payments to invoices, and even generate necessary accounting entries. This automation not only reduces the risk of human error but also speeds up the reconciliation process, freeing up valuable time for finance teams to focus on more strategic tasks.

In this blog, we will explore how automated processing rules for bank statements work in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. We’ll explore their configuration, execution, and the benefits they bring to financial operations. By the end of this post, you’ll clearly understand how these rules can enhance your organization’s efficiency and accuracy in managing bank statements.

Image/data in this blog is from SAP internal systems, sample data, or demo systems. Any resemblance to real data is purely coincidental.


Understanding Automated Processing Rules

To grasp the full potential of automated processing rules in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it’s essential to understand what these rules are and how they function within the system. Automated processing rules streamline the handling of bank statements by applying predefined criteria to transactions, which enhances efficiency and accuracy in financial reconciliation.

Definition and Overview:

Automated processing rules are a set of predefined criteria and actions configured within SAP S/4HANA Cloud that automate the processing of incoming bank statement data. These rules determine how bank transactions should be interpreted and posted into the system, minimizing the need for manual intervention. By leveraging these rules, organizations can ensure that transactions are automatically matched to corresponding invoices, allocated to the correct accounts, and recorded accurately in the general ledger.

Key Features:

Rule-Based Allocation: Automated processing rules enable the allocation of bank transactions to specific accounts or cost centers based on predefined criteria. For example, a rule might automatically allocate payments from a particular customer to a designated receivables account.

Automatic Posting: The system can automatically generate accounting entries based on the bank statement data. This means that once a bank statement is imported, the system processes it and posts the transactions to the relevant accounts without manual input.

Integration with Financial Processes: These rules are integrated with other financial processes within SAP S/4HANA Cloud, such as accounts receivable and accounts payable. This integration ensures that transactions are consistently and accurately reflected across all financial modules.

Customizable Rule Criteria: Users can configure rules to match their specific business needs. For instance, rules can be based on transaction types, amounts, or reference numbers, allowing for highly tailored and precise processing.

How It Works:

Configuration:

Users define the criteria for the rules, such as conditions that must be met for a transaction to be processed automatically. This includes setting up conditions based on transaction details like amount, bank account, or payment reference.

Data Input:

Once the bank statement data is imported into SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the system uses the configured rules to interpret and process the transactions.

Rule Application:

The system applies the rules to the imported data, performing actions such as matching payments to open invoices, allocating transactions to the correct accounts, and generating the necessary accounting entries.

Result Review:

After processing, the results are reviewed to ensure accuracy. Any exceptions or unmatched transactions are flagged for manual review, ensuring that the automated process is accurate and reliable.

By understanding these features and how they work, organizations can better leverage automated processing rules to enhance their financial operations. These rules not only reduce the time spent on manual processing but also increase the accuracy and consistency of financial data, leading to more efficient and effective bank statement management.

Example Section (Using Test Data)

Let me show you how the automated processing rules work using some test cases from our internal system. Here I am considering the rule for Incoming Payments.

Processing Rule – 7

  • Action Type – G/L Posting
  • Procedure Type – 001 (One-step Posting) – Only PA 1 will be there. (PA 1 – Posting Area 1/Bank Accounting PA2 – Posting Area 2/Subledger Accounting)

  • Bank statement

  • The automatic processing rule is applied, and the bank statement is completely processed. This is how the posting happened - the Bank Accounting journal entry is posted to the G/L account mentioned in the processing rule and the main bank G/L account.
  • Log in the Reprocess Bank Statement Items app

Note:

If there are multiple processing rule that matches the bank statement item, the system stops the application of the processing rule and raises the error “Bnk stmnt X itm Y matches conditions of several rules. No rule applied.”. Then the normal posting rule assigned to the external transaction code in the SSCUI will be applied.

Processing Rule – 8

  • Action Type – G/L Posting
  • Procedure Type – 002 (Two-step Posting) – Both Posting Areas 1 and 2 will be posted based on the G/L account we mention in the processing rule.
  • Bank statement
  • Bank Accounting and Subledger Accounting Posting.
  • Log in the Reprocess Bank Statement Items

Processing Rule – 9

  • Action Type – AP/AR Posting
  • Procedure Type – 001 (One-step Posting) Only PA 1 will be there. The Bank accounting journal entry will contain a line item posted to the main bank G/L account and the AP/AR Account mentioned in the processing Rule.
  • Bank statement
  • Bank Account journal entry
  • Log in the Reprocess Bank Statement Items

Processing Rule – 10

  • Action Type – AP/AR Posting
  • Procedure Type – 002 (Two-step Posting). Both PA 1 and PA 2 will be there. The Bank accounting journal entry will contain a line item posted to the main bank G/L account and the bank subaccount mentioned while automating the processing rule. Subledger accounting journal entry will be posted with line items to the bank subaccount mentioned while automating the processing rule and the AP/AR account.
  • Bank statement
  • Bank Accounting and Subledger Accounting journal entries
  • Log in the Reprocess Bank Statement Items app

Processing Rule - 11

  • Action Type – Clear in sequence
  • Procedure Type – 001 (One-step Posting). Only PA 1 will be there. The Bank accounting journal entry will contain a line item posted to the main bank G/L account and the AP/AR account. The AP/AR account is determined based on the processing instruction and contents of the memo line and the clearing of the open item identified will happen here.
  • Bank statement
  • Bank Accounting journal entry
  • Log in the Reprocess Bank Statement Application.

Processing Rule – 12

  • Action Type – Clear in Sequence
  • Procedure Type – 002 (Two-step Posting) – Both PA 1 and PA 2 will be there. The Bank accounting journal entry will contain a line item posted to the main bank G/L account and the bank subaccount mentioned while automating the processing rule. Subledger accounting journal entry will be posted with line items to the bank subaccount mentioned while automating the processing rule and the AP/AR account. The AP/AR account is determined based on the processing instruction and contents of the memo line and the clearing of the open item identified will happen here.
  • Bank statement
  • Bank Accounting and Subledger Accounting journal entries

  • Log in the Reprocess Bank Statement Items app

Conclusion

By automating the processing of bank statements, SAP S/4HANA Cloud significantly reduces the time and effort required for reconciliation, minimizes errors, and ensures a consistent approach to financial data management. The benefits of increased efficiency, improved accuracy, and cost savings underscore the value of integrating automated processing rules into your financial operations. These rules not only streamline routine tasks but also empower finance teams to focus on more strategic activities that drive business growth.

Call to Action

As organizations continue to seek innovative solutions to optimize their financial processes, exploring and implementing automated processing rules in SAP S/4HANA Cloud is a step in the right direction. We encourage you to delve deeper into SAP S/4HANA Cloud’s capabilities, configure and test automated processing rules tailored to your specific needs, and experience tangible improvements in your bank statement management.

References

For further reading and detailed guidance, refer to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud documentation to explore the full range of features and best practices. Embrace automation today and unlock new levels of efficiency and accuracy in your financial operations.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: SetUserStatus Method
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to know how the SetUserStatus workflow task 
TS90400041
is working. Where do I have to maintain the user status name I want to set to the document.
Thank you

entry.title: Re: entry cannot be added to maintenance table
entry.content:
Did you

  • (SM30) Click on New-Entries, try to debug?
  • (SE54, SE37 or SE80) Regenerate/Activate dialog function group
  • (ST22) Look for dump
  • (SU53) Look for authorization
  • (SE16N) Browse the table

Could you check primary keys of your ztable

entry.title: Re: Copying Multiple Images

entry.title: Re: Entering batch at the time of Putaway - EWM
entry.content:
Hi,

"Just a practical question, how I know the batch at the time of GR? So do I need to send Dummy batches everytime and at the time of putaway change those batches with real ones ?"

You either create a batch in the EWM inbound delivery, or you assign an existing batch. The inbound delivery is blocked with an error if no batch is assigned. 

"change those batches with real ones" - what is a "real" batch? Every batch is real. Do you get a delivery and this is the same batch as the one in an already existing delivery? That should not be the case very often, as usually a batch has a production and best-before date. But of course it might be.

You can also create a batch in the inbound delivery and fill the details of the batch later. Or assign another batch to the quant (via a posting change, directly in the warehouse management monitor).

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Re: Generative Künstliche Intelligenz im Corporate Learning: Use Cases, Beispiele und Tips
entry.content: Sehr nützliche Übersicht!

entry.title: Re: Calculated Inspection Characteristics using BAPI_INSP...
entry.content: Did you use the WAIT option of BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT ?

entry.title: Compare Date on SAP Build Apps based on the Sales Order API
entry.content:
Hi All ! 

I'm currently working on a SAP BTP Use case project : Anticipate delivery delay and inform the customer about it.

I'm using SAP Build Apps connected to the OData Sales Order API (API_SALES_ORDER) and Right now, the application looks like this :

The dates that you see on the screenshot were displayed by using this formula : 

 Knowing that RequestedDeliveryDate is Date/time text and a field from the A_SalesOrder entities (iso 8601) :

 

What I would like to do is to find a Sales Order by giving in input the ID(SalesOrder) OR the expected delivery date (RequestedDeliveryDate) OR both. 

I'm having trouble with the date and specially to compare them between each other.
How should I process to compare a basic date input (25.03.2024 for ex) with the RequestedDeliveryDate ?
I looked upon those but it does not work : 

- https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-build-apps-convert-date-from-odata/qaq-p/12784111 

- https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-end-to-end-scenario-use-cases/blob/main/topic1/build-apps/sap_build_apps.md 

Thanks for your help.

Regards,

Tom

entry.title: How to check the content included in the "BC Upgrade" transport in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We found some unidentified transport requests in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition while moving TR, which are marked as BC Upgrade.

We do not know the exact content in this transport request.

Can you please tell me how to know what content included in these transports?

 

Thanks

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check the content included in the "BC Upgrade"...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

The mentioned transport is a BC Upgrade, which contains hotfix content that is automatically deployed to your systems.

If you are interested in what exactly is contained in certain hotfixes you can find the related content by searching for the relevant note:

"SAP S/4HANA Cloud #### and SAP Marketing Cloud #### - Patch Collection Information Note" (replace "####" with the version number you are looking for)

For example purposes you can check the 2408 version of this note:

0003492591 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 and SAP Marketing Cloud 2408 - Patch Collection Information Note

These transports should be automatically scheduled unless the process is temporary suspended by customers, so if this was not released automatically, please take over ownership and release.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Analysis Prime Experts-as-a-Service (ExaaS) Internship
entry.content:
Thank you for posting this Internship Title: Analysis Prime Experts-as-a-Service (ExaaS) Internship - on Career Discussion Community.

If you're looking to post about an internship or job opportunity, I recommend using a dedicated job board or social media platform that offers built-in application features. These platforms are designed to handle job postings and applications effectively, ensuring privacy and efficiency for both employers and candidates.

Safeguard candidate privacy. The SAP Community's rich data on skills, participation, and learning preferences can be utilized to find ideal internship matches. Privacy remains paramount in this process.

entry.title: minSdkVersion 26 cannot be smaller than version 30 declared in barcodescanner-release (MDK,SSAM)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While doing MDK debugging setup for Sap Service and Asset Manager (SSAM) using MDK SDK 23.8.8, I am getting this error

Here are the software versions I am using:

MDK SDK: MDKCLNT23808P_8-80008652

MDK Plugin SDK: MDKPLG_SDK_AND00P_500-80008388

Asset Manager Branding SDK: ASSTMGRBRNDSDK00P_500-80008452

SSAM Metadata: 2310

I have also implement these two notes:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3499050

https://me.sap.com/notes/3480260

 

Kindly help.

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition - Display Serial Numbers on Warehouse Forms
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Is there a way to display Serial Numbers on Warehouse Forms in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition without enhancements?

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Introducing ABAP Open Source Namespaces
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

first of all, a heartfelt thank you to everyone working on this initiative.

If I may add to what has already been said. And pardon me if this not the best place, but I think it is super important, that if SAP wants to truly go from source-available to open source, SAP starts to open the information available (until now) exclusively to S-Users in the SAP Launchpad/Me.

I have a P-User, as well and from time to time check it, but even though I see some improvements, it is still really really limited.

As an Idea and a humble request, SAP could create a Developer Program with an (X?)-User, as a limited version of the SAP Partner Program (and especially, with an affordable/accessible cost), similar to what RedHat has in its "DevelopersRedHatDotCom" for example. Not only we need the access to software, licenses and most importantly the SAP Notes, but it is important to have this information easy to find and centralized in one single place, which is the SAP Me, instead of a long list of Blog posts.

I'm not expecting SAP to open all functionalities that an S-User may have, but a limited and/or read-only option to see Notes that impact the components of an ABAP Development Version (or at least some of them) is really important and would go a long way into making SAP really open-source.

I hope this would be read as a contribution for improvement and not as a critique. I am really very grateful for all the effort put into bringing us Development Versions and Open Trainings along the years. THANK YOU AGAIN!

entry.title: Re: Why not to use Field Injection in Spring Boot
entry.content: Thank you , Harshit! Nice article.

entry.title: SAPUI5 Issues with adding object as CustomData value
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to assigned an object to a CustomData value and as specified in the documentation that's possible as long as not written to html. So, this seems to be working both in XML and JS:

<Input>
    <customData>
        <core:CustomData key="myCustomData" value="{ myProperty: 'myValue' }"/>
    </customData>
</Input>
new sap.m.Input({
    customData: [
        new sap.ui.core.CustomData({ key: "myCustomData", value: { myProperty: 'myValue' } }),
    ],
});

Result:

{
    "myCustomData": {
        "myProperty": "myValue"
    }
}

But, I am having issues due to conflicts with the binding related object property names, such as 'path'. So for example, if I replace 'myProperty' with 'path', the result is:

<Input>
    <customData>
        <core:CustomData key="myCustomData" value="{ path: 'myValue' }"/>
    </customData>
</Input>
{
    "myCustomData": null
}

For XML, it looks like I can overcome this by using the same approach as for the documented SmartTable p13nData, and escape the object so it's stringified:

<Input>
    <customData>
        <core:CustomData key="myCustomData" value='\{"path": "myValue"}'/>
    </customData>
</Input>
{
    "myCustomData": "{\"path\": \"myValue\"}"
}

But for JS, I cannot figure out how to do it to keep it a string:

new sap.m.Input({
    customData: [
        new sap.ui.core.CustomData({ key: "myCustomData", value: JSON.stringify({ path: 'myValue' }) }),
    ],
});
{
    "myCustomData": null
}

I am not sure whether doing this is bad or not and also afraid of other possible conflicts in the future (if my object property name becomes a binding relevant name).

entry.title: Re: How To Do DTO in BW/4HANA Step by step
entry.content: You will get this option in BW-MT in Eclipse in ADSO General tab as shown in picture. Ideally after importing in another environment automatically the connection name should be changed if properly configured.

entry.title: Accounting document long text
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

As per the note - 3048704, Long texts are stored in ESH_SR_LTXT table, which gets updated by the program ESH_SR_LTXT_REPLICATE. We don't see the Text object for Accounting documents in this program. Is there any way to replicate ESH_SR_LTXT table with Accounting document long texts. Is there any other table where long texts are stored in decoded format.

Thanks,Girish

entry.title: Re: Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema'
entry.content:
Hi Shishir_P,

Is the issue solved? I am also following the same process. Changed the date also. But still it is givving the same error. Can you please hep me on that?

entry.title: Re: Using on-premise systems in your SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant
entry.content: @DYang, only the "default" plan for SAP Cloud Identity Services is available for BTP trial. The "connectivity" plan is not.

entry.title: Re: Custom checks to Business Partner external number
entry.content: Hi, we complete the requirement using the event BPNEX. In transaction BUPA_EVENTS you can find the events BPNUM (for internal numbering) and BPNEX (for external numbering), these are made to influence in the number being saved, but we use it to validate and trigger messages. It works partially, because the event is trigger when you change the grouping, not the BP number, but the client accepted the restrictions.

entry.title: error DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029)
entry.content:
Buenas tardes, al crear un documento basado en un borrador, devuelve el siguiente error: Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029)

el envio es el siguiente: "Document": {
"DocEntry": "305509"
}

Usamos SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.170) FP 2108 (64-bit)

Muchas gracias

entry.title: Storing payload data in Application Message Type: SAP_MessageType
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have a provision in Content Modifier where we cna store a payload fields value in the property SAP_MessageType which can be viewed via CPI monitoring as shown below. Will this fill the monitoring storage? Is it better to avoid using this property and instead use a cusom property to log using SAP_MessageProcessingLogCustomStatus. Please suggest the best practice.

entry.title: TROUBLE WITH ATP IN SALES ORDER (SAP B1/HANA)
entry.content:
Dear all

I'm facing a trouble with ATP calculation in a sales order.

I'm creating a sales order for quantity 10 on item A. This item have only 5 in stock. So, the Message coming from the delivery schedule details display that only 5 pieces can be taken (ok at this step)

The delivery schedule management show that 5 are committed and 5 are unconfirmed (still ok).

But, in the column of the sales order, the committed value is 10 and not 5. The procurement wizard start automatically (option on logistics tab) but the choice "include only unconfirmed quantities" is not displaying a purchase for 5. It brings 0.

I tried several changes on ATP rule and items but it's always the same trouble.

I don't find where I did a mistake on settings ?

Thanks for your help

Pascal

(Tests are done on SAP B1 10.00.240 SP2402)

entry.title: CAP application gives 401 unauthorized error after deployment to cloud foundry
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have created a Node.js CAP application(List report & Object page) using managed approuter and deployed it to cloud foundry. I have not added any kind of authentication in it, Package.json doesn't have an auth stanza in the requires section and this is what my xs-security file looks like :

When I go into my dev space and start the 'app-srv', it takes me to the index page where all the services are. But when i click on any service it gives 401 unauthorized . The interesting thing is when i access the app from the HTML5 Applications tab i can view the List report page and it shows me all the data.

I am also having the same issue with an app that i created with standalone approuter, As those applications dont appear in the HTML5 repository the only way to access them is through the link in your dev space. And that gives the authorization error.

Any ideas why this is happening ?

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Issues with adding object as CustomData value
entry.content:
new sap.m.Input({
    customData: [
        new sap.ui.core.CustomData({ key: "myCustomData", value: "{ path: 'myValue' }" }),
    ],
});

how about this?

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI issue HTTP operation failed invoking https://...
entry.content:
I had the same issue. What I did was format the GraphQL as a JSON. Meaning for example if you have the following query: 

mutation Purchase_order_create {
    purchase_order_create(
        data: {
            po_date: "2024-09-05"
            subtotal: "0"
            shipping_price: "0"
            total_price: "0"
            po_number: "1234"
            warehouse_id: "azerty"
            line_items: [
                {
                    sku: "en-test-01"
                    expected_weight_in_lbs: "0"
                    quantity: 10
                    fulfillment_status: "Pending"
                    price: "0"
                }
            ]
        }
    ) {
        request_id
        complexity
    }
}

send it as: 

{
"query": "mutation Purchase_order_create { purchase_order_create( data: { po_date: \"2024-09-05\" subtotal: \"0\" shipping_price: \"0\" total_price: \"0\" po_number: \"1234\" warehouse_id: \"azerty\" line_items: [ { sku: \"en-test-01\" expected_weight_in_lbs: \"0\" quantity: 10 fulfillment_status: \"Pending\" price: \"0\" } ] } ) { request_id complexity } }"
}

Hope this helps. This way you can also leave the content-type 'application/json' as specified in the documentation. 

Here is the Groovy script I created that works for my queries. Your results may vary if you have more complicated queries. 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.json.JsonOutput

def processData(Message message) {
    // Get the body of the incoming message (which contains the GraphQL query)
    def graphqlQuery = message.getBody(String)
   
    // Convert the GraphQL query to the JSON format
    def jsonResult = convertGraphQLToJSON(graphqlQuery)
   
    // Convert the JSON object to a string
    def jsonString = JsonOutput.toJson(jsonResult)
   
    // Set the formatted JSON as the new message body
    message.setBody(jsonString)
   
    return message
}

def convertGraphQLToJSON(String graphqlQuery) {
    def jsonQuery = graphqlQuery.replaceAll('"', '\\"').replaceAll('\n', ' ')
    return [query: jsonQuery]
}

entry.title: Re: Transition to SAP Cloud ALM – We’ve Got the Solution
entry.content:
Thank you @PTownsend for the very useful blog.

The following 2 links have helped me answer most questions I had:

Transition to SAP Cloud ALM for Operations 
Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) Questions & Answers 

It's clear that Java systems and non Hana databases are not supported. This makes sense in the context of those being out of support at the end of 2027.

What is the plan with Content Server on MaxDB? Currently it is possible to monitor Content Server in Solution Manger 7.2

Are you aware of a procedure guide for 'cleaning up' systems moved to CALM from Solution Manager? Do we clean these up from the SLD and LMDB too? Will CALM send the information to Maintenance  Planner? We'll still have a support stack upgrade to do before we get to S4/Hana

Thanks so much

Gavin

entry.title: solr admin page connection refused after upgrading to 9.5.0 and sap cx to 2211.27
entry.content:
Hi,

I recently upgraded my Local Sap Commerce Cloud version from 2211.21 to 2211.27 and consequently had to upgrade my local solr configuration to 9.5.0 following this kba https://me.sap.com/notes/0003424311 and upgraded the configurations in this page and this page.  Now indexes and facets seems work correctly but i still cannot access to https://localhost:8983/solr/#/login anymore, as Chrome returns me ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED error (I also tried with other browsers) without opening the page. It seems like my local instance is not running but when I try to curl my login form  curl http://localhost:8983/solr/ I get an html page stating this:

SolrCore Initialization Failures
  • core: error
Please check your logs for more information
Permission failure
Your user does not have the necessary role(s) to perform this action.
This is my output for
ps aux | grep solr
user 3063323 4.1 8.7 5496772 703256 pts/6 Sl 16:01 0:35 /home/user/.sdkman/candidates/java/current/bin/java -server -Xms512m -Xmx512m -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=250 -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -Xlog:gc*:file=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/log/solr/instances/default/solr_gc.log:time,uptime:filecount=9,filesize=20M -Dsolr.jetty.inetaccess.includes= -Dsolr.jetty.inetaccess.excludes= -Dsolr.log.dir=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/log/solr/instances/default -Djetty.port=8983 -DSTOP.PORT=7983 -DSTOP.KEY=solrrocks -Dhost=localhost -Duser.timezone=UTC -XX:-OmitStackTraceInFastThrow -XX:+CrashOnOutOfMemoryError -XX:ErrorFile=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/log/solr/instances/default/jvm_crash_%p.log -Djetty.home=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/resources/solr/9.5/server/server -Dsolr.solr.home=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/config/solr/instances/default -Dsolr.install.dir=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/resources/solr/9.5/server -Dsolr.install.symDir=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/resources/solr/9.5/server -Dsolr.default.confdir=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/resources/solr/9.5/server/server/solr/configsets/_default/conf -Djava.util.logging.manager=org.apache.logging.log4j.jul.LogManager -Dlog4j.configurationFile=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/config/solr/instances/default/log4j2.xml -Xss256k -Dsolr.data.home=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/data/solr/instances/default -Dsolr.httpclient.builder.factory=org.apache.solr.client.solrj.impl.PreemptiveBasicAuthClientBuilderFactory -Dbasicauth=solradmin:admin123 -XX:CompileCommand=exclude,com.github.benmanes.caffeine.cache.BoundedLocalCache::put -DdisableAdminUI=false -DzkACLProvider=org.apache.solr.common.cloud.DefaultZkACLProvider -DzkCredentialsProvider=org.apache.solr.common.cloud.DefaultZkCredentialsProvider -DzkCredentialsInjector=org.apache.solr.common.cloud.DefaultZkCredentialsInjector -Dsolr.log.muteconsole -jar start.jar --module=http --module=gzip
user 3081580 0.0 0.0 4028 2124 pts/6 S+ 16:15 0:00 grep --color=auto solr
 
Maybe i mismatched the exact installation directory or something about security.json? Do you know what is the problem? Please note that I'm using windows 11 with WSL.
Thank you for your time.

entry.title: Add custom field to Inbound Delivery - SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello all!

I am trying to add a custom field to inbound deliveries. However, I cannot find the right 'business context' in the custom field app.

I tried the other way around - Adapt UI. I was expecting to see the 'Add field' option using which I can jump into custom field app with the business context automatically populated:

 

Unfortunately in the inbound delivery creation screen, I don't see that option (maybe because this is a GUI screen?):

The settings here are pretty different.

Am I doing something wrong? Is it possible at all to add a custom field to the GUI screen for inbound delivery? 

Thanks

Snigdhodeep

Laurent

entry.title: Re: Custom fields for the "Manage Customer Line Items" app: use case
entry.content:
Hi @steffenriemann ,

Thank you so much for replying to my query.

I was able to solve it by making a dummy change as you suggested. I used ‘Edit Line Items’ button on 'Manage Customer line Items' App and changed the dunning block then Saved. The custom field's value was updated. Then Mass update them back to their original dunning block value.

Regards,

RG

entry.title: Custom Alert for different periods
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am setting up Custom Alert in IBP WEB UI. The question is if it is possible to compare KFs in different periods, meaning compare if S&OP Country Demand Plan in October 2024 is 30% higher than Actuals Qty in October 2023. Please, let me know if there is a way.

Best regards

Mariia

entry.title: Re: Parallel Processing with SUBMIT program

entry.title: Re: Why get_selected_rows of cl_gui_alv_grid isn't working with only one selected record?
entry.content: Please explain exactly in which context you are using get_selected_rows, and the best is to provide a small reproducible example. In the classic scenario, the issue you describe doesn't exist.

entry.title: Planning your SAP TechEd sessions? Get insights from some SAP Champions!
entry.content:
Don’t miss out on this opportunity to learn, share, and build alongside fellow tech enthusiasts. This is where ideas get real, and the future is shaped—be part of it! Each year, approaching SAP TechEd, we ask our SAP Community leaders to browse the session catalog and share with us their expert session playlists. So if you are still not sure which sessions to attend and want to plan your time wisely, check out what our SAP Champions have planned, and why!

Kunal's playlist - learn more!
1. XP101 SAP BTP strategy and highlights
2. IN100 Innovate now with a modern, AI-assisted integration suite
3. IN103 Modernize and elevate to the cloud with SAP Integration Suite
4. DA180 Explore SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud end to end
5. IN102 Take control of your APIs with the API Management and Graph capabilities


Ruthvik's playlist - learn more!
1. KEY100 SAP TechEd in 2024 Launch - Where ideas get real
2. DT100 Unlocking the intelligent enterprise: Cloud ERP innovations for the future
3. DT102 Tools and services to make your transition to SAP S/4HANA Cloud easier
4. DT180 Integrating SAP S/4HANA Cloud with SAP IBP using SAP Integration Suite


Maria Antonieta's playlist - learn more!
1. KEY100CEST SAP TechEd in 2024 Launch - Where Ideas Get Real and experience firsthand how SAP is pushing the boundaries of innovation.
2. DEV101A Keynote Recap + Community Welcome
3. DT202 Understand How Composable Architecture Can Unleash Your Business Value
4. XP204 Modernize Your Technology Landscape with SAP BTP and SAP LeanIX Solutions
5. AI100 Artificial intelligence that creates real-world results


Sebastiano's playlist - learn more!
1. DEV100A Developer Keynote [Deconstructed]: Keeping the Promise
2. AD180 Build Extensions with ABAP Cloud and Joule's ABAP Developer Capabilities
3. AD100 Unlock SAP Build and ABAP Cloud Interoperability to Keep Your Core Clean
4. AD200 Extend Joule with SAP Build and Develop Custom Enterprise Skills
5. AD181 Develop Applications and Processes with SAP Build and Joule
6. DA181 Build AI-Enabled Intelligent Data Applications to Help Keep the Core Clean
7. DEV102CEST SAP Community Welcome


Punith's playlist - learn more!
1. IN180 Future-proof your SAP PI/PO investments with SAP Integration Suite
2. IN200 Unleash the power of AI in enterprise integrations
3. IN100 Innovate now with a modern, AI-assisted integration suite


Nil's playlist - learn more!
1. DEV102CEST SAP Community Welcome
2. DA107 SAP Datasphere: Recent innovations, road map, and strategy
3. DA110 How to treat data as a product
4. AI180 Build your own generative AI scenario for your use case
5. DA180 Explore SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud end to end


Murali's playlist - learn more!
1. AD107 Boost your coding efficiency: Explore Joule's ABAP developer capabilities
2. AD102 Unlock SAP S/4HANA Cloud extensibility with SAP Build
3. AD200 Extend Joule with SAP Build and develop custom enterprise skills
4. IN202 Gain flexibility and scalability with a hybrid integration platform


Dominik's playlist - learn more!
1. KEY100CEST SAP TechEd in 2024 Launch - Where ideas get real
2. AD100 Unlock SAP Build and ABAP Cloud interoperability to elevate your extensions
3. AI180 Build your own generative AI scenario for your use case
4. AI102 Enhance business predictions with SAP Foundation Model and knowledge graphs
5. AI104 Revolutionize ABAP development with Joule, our generative AI copilot

View all expert playlists today! Come and meet our SAP Champions and SAP Mentors - see their topics of expertise, and expand your network.

@KunalBansal | @Ruthvik_Chowdary | @MariettaLopez | @smarchesini | @Punith_Oswal | @NilPeksen | @Murali_Shanmugham | @DominikTylczyn | @TammyPowlas | @DanielleLarocca | @Karen | @MortenWittrock | @StephanieMarley

entry.title: Re: Transition to SAP Cloud ALM – We’ve Got the Solution

Hello @Gavin_G,

All the best,

Paul

entry.title: Re: Close another abap program, in manner similiart to LEAVE PROGRAM
entry.content:
Apologies, we have a BADI that can be described as:

If result contain result A start transaction B for screen

                - Show result screen

                onClick SAPEVENT:RESULT?action=continue/workflow/cancel

                SAPEVENT:RESULT message action to hook and exits
what we want to change:

If result contain result A start transaction B for screen

                -Show result screen

                onClick have service contact abap to: continue/override/cancel 

                SERVICE close transaction started by main thread <- hense my question if we can have another abap program close another.

I'd like to an abap program listen to input to close the abap program getting the result, does that make sense? or is it still too vague, or is just not something that should be done?

entry.title: Re: Create or modify the background element for Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hello @xavierlegarrec and Team,
Greetings of the day !

We need to use "startdate" and "endate" fields from background element in our basis custom formulae in set bonus calculation

Currently "START/END" fields are only reserved for startdate and endate and system allows only numeric fields in custom basis formulae 

Can we change the datatype or do we have any other solution for the same?

Kindly Suggest.

Best Regards,

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Savings with Bing X Referral Code 'WXDRQL'
entry.content: in today's globalized world

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba - Spend Management Supplier registration status
entry.content: Just checking in so somebody will answer this

entry.title: Re: Email notification for integration error in SAP Business Network for Logistics
entry.content:
Dear Ravish,

I see that this app is valid for LBN freight collaboration. 

Is there a similar functionality for LBN Global Track and Trace to receive an email when integration issues occur with service providers communication ?

Kind regards,

Dirk

entry.title: Supplier Invoice S4 HANA Public cloud - CDS view for GST Tax amount & Withholding Tax Amount
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are working on developing a supplier invoice item level report and there was a requirement to add the GST tax amount and Withholding tax amount fields each line item wise.The report has been created using the following standard data sources 

  1. I_JournalEntry
  2. I_SuplrInvoiceItemGLAcctAPI01
  3. I_SupplierInvoiceTaxAPI01
  4. I_ParkedOplAcctgDocPyblsItem
  5. I_Withholdingtaxitem
  6. I_User

We tried fetching the tax amount field from the above cds and was able to get correct tax values for each line item in the supplier invoice item level report when we use the different gst tax codes for different supplier line items. But, we are getting cumulative tax values for each line item if we use same tax code for different line items due this the tax amount showing as overstated.

Is there any standard cds view that could give us the GST tax amount values at line item wise and also the WHT tax amount for supplier invoice at line item wise?

entry.title: Re: Inconsistencies after Post Goods Issues.
entry.content: Was looking for an answer for BSX & OSI Postings. OSS Note 2977680 - Single-line FI document for non-valuated goods movement answers this question
